Index.title: Welcome to Legacy Nexus
Index.description: Preserve your stories for generations to come.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.addSourceToBegin: Add a source to begin generation.
Chat.askQuestionPlaceholder: Ask any question about the sources...
Chat.disclaimer: Legacy Nexus can make mistakes. Always verify stories with family.
Chat.explainTruthPlaceholder: Explain the actual truth to the AI so it never makes this mistake again...

DashboardSidebar.audioOverviewDesc: Listen to a deep dive podcast

ProfilePage.profileDesc: Contextual information for deeper narrative generation.
ProfilePage.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete your account and clear all archived transcripts, audio files, contexts, and structural data. This action cannot be undone.
ProfilePage.typeDelete: Type DELETE below to confirm permanent destruction of your vault.
ProfilePage.profileUpdateFailed: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
ProfilePage.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again or contact support.

ContactsPage.duplicatesDesc: We found other entries with the same name.
ContactsPage.autoSplitNameTitle: Fast autofill First & Last Name from Canonical Name
ContactsPage.archiveAccessDesc: If approved as a Trusted Reader, this person's email will bypass public anonymization filters and will be authorized to view Family-Only archives.
ContactsPage.isolatedIdentityDesc: This person was synced from an address book, meaning they are a verified part of your network, but they do not appear in any collected legacy memories yet.
ContactsPage.selectPrimaryName: Select a primary name for AI compilation contexts
ContactsPage.noAliases: No aliases to elect. Add some below.
ContactsPage.selectContactDesc: Review imported relationships, verify AI extraction algorithms, and build NexusLink bonds.
ContactsPage.addContactDesc: Manually inject a person (like yourself) into the Address Book to correctly map their identity across timelines.

StoriesPage.compiledStoriesDesc: This timeline visualizes your raw transcripts synthesized into categorized narrative moments. Syncing will only scan new documents.
StoriesPage.timelineWaitingDesc:
Click "Analyze Archives" above to instruct the AI to build dynamic High-Fidelity stories straight from your uploaded journals and interview transcripts.

For the UI Gamification preview, the sample data lives below. It will be replaced when you process real files!
StoriesPage.aiReadingVault: The AI is synthetically reading your entire Legacy Vault...
StoriesPage.noGenericThemesDesc: When the AI identifies timeless life advice, philosophies, or recipes that do not fit a specific era, they will appear here as standalone cards.
StoriesPage.pleaseDoNotClose: Please do not close or refresh.
StoriesPage.linkAsAlias: Link as Alias to Address Book
StoriesPage.selectIdentityOverwrite: Select an Identity to overwrite this text...
StoriesPage.typeExactText: Type the exact text to replace the highlight with...
StoriesPage.storyboardEditorDesc: Drag to reorder chronologically within eras, or change an event's classification.

MyStoriesPage.bookEmptyDesc: You need to extract High-Fidelity Stories from your transcripts before generating chapters.
MyStoriesPage.inspiredByTrueEvents: Inspired by true events, dramatized for narrative effect
MyStoriesPage.unwrittenChapterDesc: This memory exists in your raw timeline, but it hasn't been adapted into a novelized chapter yet.
MyStoriesPage.applyingHardMagic: Applying 'Hard Magic' mechanics and the CPR framework to realistic physics...
MyStoriesPage.editorialCorrectionDesc: Found a hallucination? The AI will rewrite the chapter incorporating this specific fix.
MyStoriesPage.correctionPlaceholder: e.g. His first wife's name was actually Garbo, not Mary.

ProgressPage.buildingMonumentDesc: You aren't taking a test. You are mapping a life. Discover the areas of your narrative that shine the brightest, and uncover the gaps waiting for a story.
ProgressPage.lifeCoverageDesc: Visualizing the density of your archived stories across chronological eras based on AI extraction.
ProgressPage.narrativeGap: A narrative gap waiting to be filled in your {era}.
ProgressPage.architectPromptDesc: You have excellent coverage of certain life periods, but others remain largely undocumented in the High-Fidelity cache.
ProgressPage.considerUploading: Consider uploading stories to map those timelines!
ProgressPage.theArchitectsStudyDesc: The AI has synthesized a cross-metric paradox examining the friction between your actions and reflections.
ProgressPage.roundOutLegacyDesc1: The AI notes your {category} dimension is structurally your smallest mapped node overall.
ProgressPage.roundOutLegacyDesc2: Can you drop a story into the archive about a time you engaged heavily with the {category} side of life?
ProgressPage.narrativeArchetypesDesc: Themes computed and dynamically synced from your Story Archive using the Holland Codes framework. Expand your hexagon by sharing different dimensions of your personality.
ProgressPage.runArchiveCompiler: Please <Link href="/stories" className="text-indigo-600 dark:text-indigo-400 underline underline-offset-2 font-bold hover:text-indigo-500">run the Archive Compiler</Link> to generate your summary analysis.
ProgressPage.oracleInsightMissing: The Oracle has not generated an insight for this explicitly.
ProgressPage.liveAnalyticsDesc: These visualizations are mapped precisely to the mathematical tags outputted dynamically by the Archivist AI when you compile your transcripts.

SourcesPage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to completely delete "{fileName}"? This will trigger a recompile of all associated Timeline Facts.
SourcesPage.errorDeleting: An error occurred while deleting the source.
SourcesPage.onDemandReconstructionDesc: Reading a document for the very first time will dynamically task the AI to rebuild raw, unformatted text blocks natively back into an interactive conversational dialogue. This "on-demand" extraction prevents severe computation delays during initial file uploads and automatically caches the formatted script back to your cloud vault permanently.
SourcesPage.noPrimarySources: No primary sources uploaded yet. Return to the dashboard to begin archiving.

SourceViewerPage.unableToParse: UNABLE_TO_PARSE: This document seems to have no machine-readable text (it may be a scanned image). Please re-upload a text-searchable version.
SourceViewerPage.identifyingSpeakers: Identifying speakers, context, and structural document type...
SourceViewerPage.classifyingDocument: Classifying document constraints and formatting extraction pipeline...
